title: Author + publish ≥3 decks (~300+ cards) via the repeatable pipeline
context: With the M0 cold-start proven and the M1 pipeline (linter, license gate, GUID tooling, publishing adapter, reviewer workflow) operational, the first repeatable batch run validates that the full pipeline scales beyond a single deck. At least 3 decks (~300+ cards) must pass through the entire pipeline—license gate, linter/CI, human accuracy review, and publishing adapter—to confirm the workflow is genuinely repeatable and to measure reviewer-corrected rate and error-taxonomy mix.
objective: Author and publish at least 3 decks (~300+ cards total) using the full M1 pipeline: license gate, deck linter/CI, human accuracy review per the doc-001 rubric, and publishing adapter.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 decks with ~300+ total cards published via license gate, linter/CI, human accuracy review, and publishing adapter.
Each deck passes all CI gates (schema, cloze, GUIDs, attribution, HTML, license) with no overrides.
Every card accuracy-reviewed using the 4-dimension rubric; reviewer-corrected rate and error-taxonomy mix recorded per deck.
Medium-risk subjects (if any) domain-reviewed by a relevant subject-matter expert.
All decks carry full attribution; all build deterministically and update non-destructively.
PR includes the deck JSON files, accuracy-review records, and a batch-run summary report.
output: A merged PR containing at least 3 CrowdAnki JSON deck files (~300+ cards) in decks/, published via the full M1 pipeline, with accuracy-review records and a batch-run summary report.
